import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0
  while i <= n
    mut b = 32
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(s, i)
      when Some(x)
        b = x
      when None
        b = 32
      end
    end

    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      if not in_num
        in_num = true
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
    else if b == 45 and not in_num
      in_num = true
      sign = -1
      val = 0
    else if b == 43 and not in_num
      in_num = true
      sign = 1
      val = 0
    else
      if in_num
        result = list.push(result, sign * val)
        in_num = false
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let k = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end

  let total = list.len(nums)
  let take = if k > total
    total
  else
    k
  end

  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut used: List<Int> = []
  mut taken = 0
  while taken < take
    mut best_idx = -1
    mut best_val = 0
    mut j = 0
    while j < total
      if not list.contains(used, j)
        match list.get(nums, j)
        when Some(v)
          if best_idx == -1 or v > best_val
            best_idx = j
            best_val = v
          end
        when None
          best_idx = best_idx
        end
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    result = list.push(result, best_val)
    used = list.push(used, best_idx)
    taken = taken + 1
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  let m = list.len(result)
  while i < m
    match list.get(result, i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      out = out
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
